core_mechanism: exhaustive classification of all bilinear (quadratic) forms left invariant under a discrete group's linear representation — i.e., enumerating the full commutant of a group action subject to non-negativity and integrality constraints on the coefficients
brief_reason: The paper's whole method is to solve the complete classification of modular invariant partition functions, which are integer-coefficient quadratic combinations of characters left fixed by the (discrete) modular group's action, so the underlying machinery is the exhaustive enumeration of admissible invariants of a group representation.
